Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer

Packages that use Serializer
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.examples.serializer
Serializer Examples
org.apache.juneau.http.classic
Predefined HTTP headers, parts, entities, resources, and responses built on the classic Apache HttpComponents API.
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.entity
HTTP Entity Beans
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API

  • Uses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.config

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.config with parameters of type Serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Config
    Config.set(String key, Object value, Serializer serializer)
    Same as Config.set(String, Object) but allows you to specify the serializer to use to serialize the value.
    Config
    Config.set(String key, Object value, Serializer serializer, String modifiers, String comment, List<String> preLines)
    Same as Config.set(String, Object) but allows you to specify all aspects of a value.

    Subclasses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.examples.serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ImageSerializer
    Example serializer that converts BufferedImage objects to byte streams.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static final SerializedEntity
    HttpEntities.serializedEntity(Object content, Serializer serializer)
    Creates a new SerializedEntity object.
    static final SerializedEntity
    HttpEntities.serializedEntity(Object content, Serializer serializer, HttpPartSchema schema)
    Creates a new SerializedEntity object.

    Creates a new SerializedEntity object.
    static final SerializedEntity
    HttpEntities.serializedEntity(Supplier<?> content, Serializer serializer, HttpPartSchema schema)
    Creates a new SerializedEntity object.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SerializedEntity
    SerializedEntity.copyWith(Serializer serializer, HttpPartSchema schema)
    Copies this bean and sets the serializer and schema on it.
    SerializedEntity
    SerializedEntity.setSerializer(Serializer value)
    Sets the serializer on this entity bean.

    Constructor
    Description

    Subclasses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BsonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to BSON (Binary JSON).
    static class 
    BsonSerializer.Base64
    Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
    static class 
    BsonSerializer.SpacedHex
    Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.

  • Uses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.html

    Subclasses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HtmlDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as HTML documents.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaDocSerializer
    Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer
    Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.Simple
    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.SimpleReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode, with whitespace.
    class 
    HtmlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to HTML.
    static class 
    HtmlSerializer.Sq
    Default serializer, single quotes.
    static class 
    HtmlSerializer.SqReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.
    class 
    HtmlStrippedDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as stripped HTML.

    JcsSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to canonical JSON per RFC 8785 (JCS).

  • Uses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

    Subclasses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonLdSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to JSON-LD format.
    class 
    N3Serializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N3 (Notation3) format.
    class 
    NQuadsSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Quads format.
    class 
    NTripleSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Triples notation.
    class 
    RdfJsonSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/JSON notation.
    class 
    RdfProtoSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/PROTO binary format.
    class 
    RdfSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to RDF.
    class 
    RdfStreamSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
    class 
    RdfThriftSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
    class 
    RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML-Abbrev (abbreviated XML notation).
    class 
    RdfXmlSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML (standard XML notation).
    class 
    TriGSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriG format.
    class 
    TriXSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriX (XML) format.
    class 
    TurtleSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to Turtle format.

    JsonSerializer

    Serializes POJO models to Markdown (fragment mode: tables and lists).

    Modifier and Type
    Class

    PlainTextSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to plain text using just the toString() method on the serialized object.

  • Uses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer

    Subclasses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    OutputStreamSerializer
    Subclass of Serializer for byte-based serializers.
    static class 
    Serializer.Null
    Represents no Serializer.
    static class 
    SerializerSet.Inherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should be inherited.
    static class 
    SerializerSet.NoInherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should not be inherited.
    class 
    WriterSerializer
    Subclass of Serializer for character-based serializers.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer that return Serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Serializer
    Serializer.Builder.build()
     
    final Serializer
    Serializer.forEachAcceptMediaType(Consumer<MediaType> action)
    Performs an action on the media types handled based on the value of the accept parameter passed into the constructor.
    Serializer
    SerializerMatch.getSerializer()
    Returns the serializer that matched the HTTP Accept header value.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer that return types with arguments of type Serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Serializer>
    SerializerSet.getSerializer(String acceptHeader)
    Same as SerializerSet.getSerializerMatch(String) but returns just the matched serializer.
    Optional<Serializer>
    SerializerSet.getSerializer(MediaType mediaType)
    Same as SerializerSet.getSerializerMatch(MediaType) but returns just the matched serializer.
    List<Serializer>
    SerializerSet.getSerializers()
    Returns a copy of the serializers in this group.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer with parameters of type Serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SerializerSet.Builder
    SerializerSet.Builder.add(Serializer... s)
    Registers the specified serializers with this group.
    static SerializerSession.Builder<?>
    SerializerSession.create(Serializer ctx)
    Creates a new builder for this object.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Serializer.Builder
    Serializer.createSerializerBuilder(Class<? extends Serializer> c)
    Instantiates a builder of the specified serializer class.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SseSerializer
    Serializes SseEvent objects to the text/event-stream wire format defined by the WHATWG Server-Sent Events spec.

  • Uses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon

    Subclasses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    UonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to UON (a notation for URL-encoded query parameter values).
    static class 
    UonSerializer.Encoding
    Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().encoding().build();.
    static class 
    UonSerializer.Readable
    Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().ws().build();.

  • Uses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding

    Subclasses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to URL-encoded notation with UON-encoded values (a notation for URL-encoded query paramter values).
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Expanded
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().expandedParams().build();.
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.PlainText
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().plainTextParts().build();.
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Readable
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().useWhitespace().build();.

  • Uses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml

    Subclasses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    XmlDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as XML.
    static class 
    XmlDocSerializer.Ns
    Default serializer without namespaces.
    class 
    XmlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to XML.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.Ns
    Default serializer without namespaces.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.NsSq
    Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.NsSqReadable
    Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes, with whitespace.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.Sq
    Default serializer, single quotes.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.SqReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.

  • Uses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.rest.client

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client that return types with arguments of type Serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Serializer>
    RestClient.getDefaultSerializer()
    Returns the explicitly-configured default serializer used for outbound bodies when the format is not otherwise discernable.
    Optional<Serializer>
    RestClient.getSerializerForMediaType(String mediaType)
    Returns the registered request serializer matching the given media type, or Optional.empty() if none matches.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client with parameters of type Serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.defaultSerializer(Serializer value)
    Designates the default serializer used for outbound bodies when no registered serializer matches the requested media type.
    static SerializerBody
    SerializerBody.of(Serializer serializer, Object value)
    Creates a SerializerBody using the serializer's own media type.
    static SerializerBody
    SerializerBody.of(Serializer serializer, Object value, String contentType)
    Creates a SerializerBody with an explicit content type.
    static RecordStreamBody
    RecordStreamBody.records(Serializer serializer, Consumer<RecordWriter> consumer)
    Creates a body that streams via a RecordWriter (whole-value record cursor) using the given serializer.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.serializer(Serializer... value)
    Appends serializers (built into a SerializerSet at build time if no set was supplied).
    static RecordStreamBody
    RecordStreamBody.token(Serializer serializer, Consumer<TokenWriter> consumer)
    Creates a body that streams via a TokenWriter (fine-grained structural cursor) using the given serializer.

  • Uses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic with parameters of type Serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> T
    RestClient.getRemote(Class<T> interfaceClass, Object rootUrl, Serializer serializer, Parser parser)
    Same as RestClient.getRemote(Class, Object) but allows you to override the serializer and parser used.
    <T> T
    RestClient.getRrpcInterface(Class<T> interfaceClass, Object uri, Serializer serializer, Parser parser)
    Same as RestClient.getRrpcInterface(Class, Object) but allows you to override the serializer and parser used.
    SELF
    RestClient.Builder.serializer(Serializer value)
    Serializer.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.serializer(Serializer serializer)
    Specifies the serializer to use on the request body.
    SELF
    RestClient.Builder.serializers(Serializer... value)
    Serializers.
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic with type arguments of type Serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SELF
    RestClient.Builder.serializer(Class<? extends Serializer> value)
    Serializer.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.serializer(Class<? extends Serializer> serializer)
    Specifies the serializer to use on the request body.

    Modifier and Type

    MockRestRequest.serializer(Serializer serializer)
     
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic with type arguments of type Serializer

    MockRestRequest.serializer(Class<? extends Serializer> serializer)
     

  • Uses of Serializer in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server with parameters of type Serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.setSerializer(Serializer value)
    Forces the Serializer used to serialize the response body set via RestResponse.setContent(Object) (or an equivalent return from the REST method), instead of choosing one from the Accept header.
